violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Staff moved the eggs during this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Staff, washed, rinsed, and sanitized the knives during this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (nozzles at the beverage station) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the nozzles during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of flour and rice. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the waitress station area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving throughout the kitchen, gaskets on the prep unit, fans in the refrigerators, refrigerator in the waitress station, and hood/vent in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The floors in the walk-in cooler and floors in the walk-in freezer observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

The floors throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Door sweep needs to be extended so entire door is tight fitting. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
The floors/pipes were observed with an accumulation of food debris and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Fish and beef were relocated in the walk-in and stored properly. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Door sweep to be lowered. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
Bags of food were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and portable fans in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, food residue, grease and other debris. Establishment to clean all non food contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The hot water at the kitchen handsink was turned off during arrival. Hot water was turned back on. Hot water must always be available at the hand wash sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of grease and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
